[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]

- Description: DAPP §9b/§16 sweep batch 1 — 8 pages migrated
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):

  Details:
  DAPP §9b/§16 sweep batch 1, 2026-05-29.
  
  8 dapp pages migrated to the new submission-result + print conventions (DAPP_PAGE_CONVENTIONS.md §9b + §16). One PR per page per Gary's safety-first preference.
  
  PRs delivered (all in dapp_beta):
  
  1. #14 report_tree_planting — §9b + §16, capture Edgar resp.text() with JSON-fallback (was discarded).
  2. #15 report_capital_injection — §9b + §16.
  3. #16 report_inventory_movement — §9b + §16.
  4. #17 report_dao_expenses — §9b + §16.
  5. #18 report_sales — §9b + §16, capture Edgar resp.text() with JSON-fallback.
  6. #19 report_asset_receipt — §9b + §16.
  7. #20 report_contribution — §9b (§16 was in #13). Online success path now also surfaces signed payload + Edgar response; offline-fallback paths unchanged.
  8. #21 governor_permissions — §9b + §16 with per-change append pattern (batch-submit page; each independently signed change appends its own request/response pair).
  
  Closes the entire report_*.html group + governor_permissions. 16 dapp pages remaining for the sweep: partner_check_in, mint_donation, create_proposal, review_proposal, register_farm, notarize, currency_conversion, repackaging_planner, warmup_review, update_qr_code, batch_qr_generator, create_signature, scanner, stores_nearby, store_interaction_history (last 4 may not fit the convention; will verify per page).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
